description: Defines and exports all canonical artifact model schemas used across the platform. This is the single authoritative source for artifact envelopes, structured artifact types, and artifact identity primitives.
forbidden_responsibilities: Domain-specific artifact logic (e.g., frequency allocation schemas, meeting minutes structure)
Lifecycle state management — that belongs to control_plane.lifecycle
Evaluation result envelopes — those are defined in control_plane.evaluation
Workflow orchestration — that belongs to orchestration.pipeline
Any consumer-specific transformation of artifact data
